# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

module.exports = async (req, res) => {
    const headers = {
        'Content-Type': 'text/html', // You can use any content type here that is understood by Vercel
        'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*' // We need this because of the example website we're using to consume this. Feel free to change the value as required
    }

    res.setHeader('Cache-control', 'public, max-age=30') // Some sample Cache-control header

    const reqBody = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>()
        .pipeTo(reqBody);
}
